response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content to identify intro/outro talk and the central vocal performance. 2. Identified performance of 'ULTRA C' at 00:42 by Anya Melfissa, Pavolia Reine, and Airani Iofifteen. 3. Used on-screen credits to identify original lyrics by Reol and music by TeddyLoid/Giga. 4. Searched for 'ULTRA C Reol TeddyLoid Giga lyrics'. 5. Retrieved full lyrics and English translation from search results. 6. Structured data into scenes including non-musical segments.
response.global_summary: The video features a conversation among VTubers, followed by a vocal performance of the song 'ULTRA C', and concludes with further dialogue and scene transitions.

scenes.description: Introductory dialogue among Anya Melfissa, Pavolia Reine, and Airani Iofifteen.
A performance of 'ULTRA C' by Anya Melfissa, Pavolia Reine, and Airani Iofifteen. On-screen text credits the lyrics to Reol and music to TeddyLoid and Giga.
